name: Boiled Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, combine the butter, eggs, sugar, mustard, salt, and pepper.
2. Cook over very hot water until the mixture begins to thicken.
3. Stir in the vinegar and continue cooking for an additional 3 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and beat occasionally while cooling.
5. Store in a cool, dark place. This dressing will remain good for several weeks.
